short_term.label: Short_Term // 1-2 Years
short_term.title: Mastering & Delivering
short_term.desc: Focusing on building high-quality, scalable web applications for real-world clients. I want to deepen my expertise in modern frameworks, optimize performance, and deliver seamless user experiences.

long_term.label: Long_Term // 3-5+ Years
long_term.title: Tech Leadership & Open Source
long_term.desc: Evolving into a Tech Lead or System Architect. I aim to contribute significantly to the open-source community, build tools that help other developers, and mentor the next generation of engineers.

end.cta_desc: Turning complex requirements into scalable web applications. I focus on writing maintainable code and delivering reliable solutions that simply work.
